title: Native Token Balance
description: Lightweight check for the native token balance (ETH, MATIC, BNB, etc.) of any wallet across any chain.
useCase: Check if a wallet has enough native gas token to cover a transaction before sending — gate app actions by a minimum ETH/MATIC/BNB balance threshold.

keyParams.chainName: EVM chain identifier (e.g. eth-mainnet, base-mainnet, matic-mainnet)
